values.value: Agent Topic accesses sensitive standard objects

One or more Agentforce agent topic definitions reference Account, Contact, Opportunity, Case, or financial objects without row-level filters. The AI may return sensitive data to any user who prompts the agent. This is a heuristic check - manual review required to confirm.
Agent topics with broad object access can return confidential financial, health, or personal data in natural language AI responses visible to any user who prompts the agent.
Add row-level filters or data access policies to topic definitions. Limit sensitive object access to agent topics used only by admins or privileged roles.
